questions.question: Create a user with username 'admin' and grant all database permissions to this user. List the specific permissions granted in your SQL query.
questions.hint: Use the GRANT and CREATE USER statements.

questions.question: What is the SQL statement used to create a user with all database permissions in MySQL?
questions.hint: E.g. GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'admin'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY 'password';

questions.question: Suppose you want to grant all database permissions to a user 'admin' on a specific database 'mydb'. Which SQL statement would you use?
questions.hint: Use the GRANT statement with the DATABASE keyword.
